GET /twitter/user_about.heading_zh: 获取用户 About 资料 GET /twitter/user_about
GET /twitter/user_about.desc_en: Fetch the public profile and the 'About this account' panel for a single user identified by screen name, including account origin, identity labels, and affiliate badges.
GET /twitter/user_about.description_zh: 按用户名获取单个用户的公开资料及「关于此账号」面板，包含账号归属地、身份标签与所属机构徽章等信息。

GET /twitter/user/batch_info_by_ids.heading_zh: 按 ID 批量获取用户信息 GET /twitter/user/batch_info_by_ids
GET /twitter/user/batch_info_by_ids.desc_en: Look up the profiles of multiple users in one call by passing their numeric user IDs, avoiding one request per user.
GET /twitter/user/batch_info_by_ids.description_zh: 一次请求传入多个数字用户 ID，批量查询这些用户的资料，避免逐个用户单独请求。

GET /twitter/user/info.desc_en: Fetch the profile of a single user identified by screen name.
GET /twitter/user/info.description_zh: 按用户名获取单个用户的资料。

GET /twitter/user/tweet_timeline.heading_zh: 获取用户推文时间线 GET /twitter/user/tweet_timeline
GET /twitter/user/tweet_timeline.desc_en: Retrieve a user's own tweets in reverse-chronological order, matching the ordering shown on their profile. Optionally include replies and the parent tweets they reply to; paginate with the cursor.
GET /twitter/user/tweet_timeline.description_zh: 按时间倒序获取某个用户自己发布的推文，顺序与其资料页一致。可选择是否包含回复及被回复的父推文，并通过游标翻页。

GET /twitter/user/last_tweets.heading_zh: 获取用户最新推文 GET /twitter/user/last_tweets
GET /twitter/user/last_tweets.desc_en: Retrieve a user's most recent tweets, identified by either user ID or screen name, with optional replies and cursor pagination.
GET /twitter/user/last_tweets.description_zh: 获取某个用户最近发布的推文，可用用户 ID 或用户名指定，支持可选包含回复及游标翻页。

GET /twitter/user/followers.desc_en: List the accounts that follow a given user, identified by screen name, with cursor pagination and a configurable page size.
GET /twitter/user/followers.description_zh: 按用户名获取关注某个用户的账号列表，支持游标翻页与可配置的每页数量。

userName.desc_en: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose About profile you want.
userName.title_zh: 要查询其 About 资料的用户名（@ 后的部分，不含 @）。

data.desc_en: The user's profile and About-panel details.
data.title_zh: 用户的资料及 About 面板详情。

data.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
data.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

data.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一。

data.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.

data.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
data.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

data.protected.desc_en: Whether the account is protected, meaning its tweets are visible only to approved followers.
data.protected.title_zh: 账号是否为受保护状态，即推文仅对获批准的关注者可见。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.desc_en: The highlighted affiliation badge that marks the user as belonging to a parent organization.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.title_zh: 突出展示的所属机构徽章，标识用户隶属于某个母机构。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: The badge image of the affiliation.
Web link to the badge image.
Text describing the affiliation, such as the parent organization's name.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 描述所属机构的文字，如母机构名称。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: Link the affiliation badge points to.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 所属机构徽章指向的链接。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: Destination address of the affiliation link.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 所属机构链接的目标地址。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: Category of the affiliation link, indicating how it should be handled.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 所属机构链接的类别，指示其处理方式。
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..annotation: 源码未声明 urlType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: How the affiliation label is rendered on the profile.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 该所属机构标签在资料页的呈现方式。
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..annotation: 源码未声明 userLabelDisplayType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..desc_en: The kind of user label this badge represents.
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..title_zh: 该徽章所代表的用户标签种类。
data.affiliates_highlighted_label.label..annotation: 源码未声明 userLabelType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.about_profile.desc_en: Contents of the 'About this account' panel, such as where the account is based and how that location was determined.
data.about_profile.title_zh: 「关于此账号」面板的内容，如账号所在地及其判定方式。

data.about_profile.account_based_in.desc_en: Country or region X reports the account is based in.
data.about_profile.account_based_in.title_zh: X 标注的账号所在国家或地区。

data.about_profile.location_accurate.desc_en: Whether the reported account location is considered accurate.
data.about_profile.location_accurate.title_zh: 标注的账号所在地是否被认为准确。

data.about_profile.learn_more_url.desc_en: Link to X's help page explaining the About-account information.
data.about_profile.learn_more_url.title_zh: 指向 X 帮助页的链接，说明账号相关信息。

data.about_profile.affiliate_username.desc_en: Screen name of the organization this account is affiliated with.
data.about_profile.affiliate_username.title_zh: 该账号所属机构的用户名。

data.about_profile.source.desc_en: Where the About-account information was sourced from.
data.about_profile.source.annotation: 源码未声明 source 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.about_profile.username_changes.desc_en: Summary of how often the account has changed its username.
data.about_profile.username_changes.title_zh: 账号修改用户名的次数概况。

data.about_profile.username_changes.coun.desc_en: Number of times the account has changed its username.
data.about_profile.username_changes.coun.title_zh: 账号修改过用户名的次数。

data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.desc_en: Highlighted identity label, such as a government or official-account marker.
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.title_zh: 突出展示的身份标签，如政府或官方账号标记。
描述该身份标签的文字。

data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.desc_en: The badge image of the identity label.
Web link to the badge image.
Link the identity label points to.
Destination address of the identity-label link.
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.title_zh: 身份标签链接的目标地址。

data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.desc_en: Category of the identity-label link, indicating how it should be handled.
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.title_zh: 身份标签链接的类别，指示其处理方式。
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.annotation: 源码未声明 urlType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.desc_en: How the identity label is rendered on the profile.
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.title_zh: 该身份标签在资料页的呈现方式。
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.annotation: 源码未声明 userLabelDisplayType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.desc_en: The kind of user label this identity badge represents.
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.title_zh: 该身份徽章所代表的用户标签种类。
data.identity_profile_labels_highlighted.annotation: 源码未声明 userLabelType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the profile was returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回资料为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userIds.desc_en: Comma-separated list of numeric user IDs to look up in this batch.
userIds.title_zh: 本次批量查询的数字用户 ID 列表，以逗号分隔。

users.desc_en: Profiles of the requested users, one entry per matched ID.
users.title_zh: 所查询用户的资料，每个匹配到的 ID 对应一条。

users.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
users.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

users.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
users.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

users.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
users.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

users.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
users.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

users.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
users.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

users.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
users.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

users.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
users.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

users.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
users.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

users.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

users.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
users.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

users.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

users.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

users.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
users.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

users.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
users.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

users.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
users.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

users.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
users.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

users.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
users.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

users.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
users.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

users.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
users.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

users.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
users.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

users.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
users.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

users.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
users.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

users.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
users.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

users.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
users.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

users.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
users.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

users.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
users.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

users.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
users.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when users were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回用户为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userName.desc_en: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose profile you want.
userName.title_zh: 要查询其资料的用户名（@ 后的部分，不含 @）。

users.desc_en: Profile of the requested user; carries a single matched entry.
users.title_zh: 所查询用户的资料，仅含一条匹配结果。

users.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
users.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

users.userName.desc_en: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
users.userName.title_zh: 用户的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

users.url.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile page.
users.url.title_zh: 用户资料页的网页链接。

users.name.desc_en: The user's display name shown on the profile.
users.name.title_zh: 用户在资料页展示的昵称。

users.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
users.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 用户是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

users.verifiedType.desc_en: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.
users.verifiedType.title_zh: 用户的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

users.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's avatar image.
users.profilePicture.title_zh: 用户头像图片的网页链接。

users.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the user's profile banner image.
users.coverPicture.title_zh: 用户资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

users.description.title_zh: 用户资料页的个人简介文字。

users.location.desc_en: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.
users.location.title_zh: 用户在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

users.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the user.

users.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the user follows.

users.canDm.desc_en: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
users.canDm.title_zh: 该用户当前是否接受请求方的私信。

users.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the user's account was created.
users.createdAt.title_zh: 该用户账号的创建时间。

users.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the user has liked.
users.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该用户点赞过的推文数。

users.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the user has created custom timelines.
users.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该用户是否创建过自定义时间线。

users.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.
users.isTranslator.title_zh: 该用户是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

users.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the user has posted.
users.mediaCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的媒体条目数。

users.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the user has posted.
users.statusesCount.title_zh: 该用户发布过的推文总数。

users.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.
users.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该用户账号的国家／地区代码列表。

users.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
users.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该用户的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

users.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.
users.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该用户置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

users.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
users.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

users.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
users.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

users.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
users.unavailable.title_zh: 该用户账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

users.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
users.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

users.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
users.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the user was returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回用户为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userId.desc_en: Identifier of the user whose timeline to retrieve.
userId.title_zh: 要获取其时间线的用户标识。

includeReplies.desc_en: Whether replies posted by the user are included alongside their original tweets.
includeReplies.title_zh: 是否在用户的原创推文之外一并返回其发布的回复。

includeParentTweet.desc_en: When a returned tweet is a reply, whether to also include the tweet it replies to.
includeParentTweet.title_zh: 当返回的推文是一条回复时，是否同时返回其所回复的父推文。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

tweets.desc_en: Tweets returned for this page of the user's timeline.
tweets.title_zh: 本页用户时间线返回的推文集合。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when the timeline was returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回时间线为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userId.desc_en: Identifier of the user whose recent tweets to retrieve; provide this or userName.
userId.title_zh: 要获取其最新推文的用户标识；与 userName 二选一提供。

userName.desc_en: Screen name of the user whose recent tweets to retrieve; provide this or userId.
userName.title_zh: 要获取其最新推文的用户名；与 userId 二选一提供。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

includeReplies.desc_en: Whether replies posted by the user are included alongside their original tweets.
includeReplies.title_zh: 是否在用户的原创推文之外一并返回其发布的回复。

tweets.desc_en: The user's most recent tweets returned for this page.
tweets.title_zh: 本页返回的用户最新推文。

tweets.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.
tweets.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为推文。

tweets.url.desc_en: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.
tweets.url.title_zh: 推文在 X/Twitter 上的网页链接。

tweets.text.desc_en: Full text content of the tweet.

tweets.source.desc_en: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.
tweets.source.title_zh: 发布该推文所用的客户端应用名称。

tweets.retweetCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

tweets.replyCount.desc_en: Number of replies to the tweet.

tweets.likeCount.desc_en: Number of likes on the tweet.

tweets.quoteCount.desc_en: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.
tweets.quoteCount.title_zh: 引用该推文的引用推文数。

tweets.viewCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

tweets.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

tweets.lang.desc_en: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.
tweets.lang.title_zh: 推文正文被识别出的语言，以语言代码表示。

tweets.bookmarkCount.desc_en: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

tweets.isReply.desc_en: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.
tweets.isReply.title_zh: 该推文是否为对另一条推文的回复。

tweets.inReplyToId.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.
tweets.inReplyToId.title_zh: 该推文直接回复的目标推文标识；仅当 isReply 为真时存在。

tweets.conversationId.desc_en: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.
tweets.conversationId.title_zh: 该推文所属对话线程的起始推文标识。

tweets.displayTextRange.desc_en: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.
tweets.displayTextRange.title_zh: 标记推文正文中可显示部分的起止字符位置。

tweets.inReplyToUserId.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.

tweets.inReplyToUsername.desc_en: Username of the user being replied to.

has_next_page.desc_en: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.
has_next_page.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为真时用 next_cursor 再次请求即可获取。

next_cursor.desc_en: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.
next_cursor.title_zh: 下一次请求时作为 cursor 参数传入，用于获取下一页的游标。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when tweets were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回推文为 success，否则为 error。

message.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
message.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。

userName.desc_en: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose followers you want.
userName.title_zh: 要查询其关注者的用户名（@ 后的部分，不含 @）。

cursor.desc_en: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.
cursor.title_zh: 翻页游标，取自上一次响应的 next_cursor；首页请求留空即可。

pageSize.desc_en: How many followers to return per page.
pageSize.title_zh: 每页返回的关注者数量。

users.desc_en: Followers of the user, returned for this page.
users.title_zh: 本页返回的关注该用户的关注者。

users.type.desc_en: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.
users.type.title_zh: 对象类型标记，标识该条目为用户。

users.userName.desc_en: The follower's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.
users.userName.title_zh: 关注者的 @ 用户名，在 X/Twitter 上唯一，用于资料页地址。

users.url.desc_en: Web link to the follower's profile page.
users.url.title_zh: 关注者资料页的网页链接。

users.name.desc_en: The follower's display name shown on the profile.
users.name.title_zh: 关注者在资料页展示的昵称。

users.isBlueVerified.desc_en: Whether the follower holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.
users.isBlueVerified.title_zh: 关注者是否拥有付费的 X（Twitter）Blue 认证。

users.verifiedType.desc_en: The follower's verification category, such as a business or government account.
users.verifiedType.title_zh: 关注者的认证类别，如企业或政府账号。

users.profilePicture.desc_en: Web link to the follower's avatar image.
users.profilePicture.title_zh: 关注者头像图片的网页链接。

users.coverPicture.desc_en: Web link to the follower's profile banner image.
users.coverPicture.title_zh: 关注者资料页横幅图片的网页链接。

users.description.title_zh: 关注者资料页的个人简介文字。

users.location.desc_en: Free-text location the follower lists on their profile.
users.location.title_zh: 关注者在资料页填写的所在地（自由文本）。

users.followers.desc_en: Number of accounts following the follower.
users.followers.title_zh: 关注该关注者的账号数。

users.following.desc_en: Number of accounts the follower follows.
users.following.title_zh: 该关注者关注的账号数。

users.canDm.desc_en: Whether the follower currently accepts direct messages from the requester.
users.canDm.title_zh: 该关注者当前是否接受请求方的私信。

users.createdAt.desc_en: Timestamp when the follower's account was created.
users.createdAt.title_zh: 该关注者账号的创建时间。

users.favouritesCount.desc_en: Number of tweets the follower has liked.
users.favouritesCount.title_zh: 该关注者点赞过的推文数。

users.hasCustomTimelines.desc_en: Whether the follower has created custom timelines.
users.hasCustomTimelines.title_zh: 该关注者是否创建过自定义时间线。

users.isTranslator.desc_en: Whether the follower participates in the Twitter translation program.
users.isTranslator.title_zh: 该关注者是否参与 Twitter 翻译计划。

users.mediaCount.desc_en: Number of media items the follower has posted.
users.mediaCount.title_zh: 该关注者发布过的媒体条目数。

users.statusesCount.desc_en: Total number of tweets the follower has posted.
users.statusesCount.title_zh: 该关注者发布过的推文总数。

users.withheldInCountries.desc_en: Country codes where the follower's account is withheld for legal reasons.
users.withheldInCountries.title_zh: 因法律原因屏蔽该关注者账号的国家／地区代码列表。

users.possiblySensitive.desc_en: Whether the follower's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.
users.possiblySensitive.title_zh: 该关注者的内容是否被标记为可能含敏感信息。

users.pinnedTweetIds.desc_en: Identifiers of tweets the follower has pinned to the top of their profile.
users.pinnedTweetIds.title_zh: 该关注者置顶在资料页顶部的推文标识列表。

users.isAutomated.desc_en: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.
users.isAutomated.title_zh: 该账号是否被标记为自动化（机器人）账号。

users.automatedBy.desc_en: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.
users.automatedBy.title_zh: 管理该自动化账号的个人或机构的用户名。

users.unavailable.desc_en: Whether the follower's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.
users.unavailable.title_zh: 该关注者账号当前是否不可用，例如被封禁或停用。

users.message.desc_en: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.
users.message.title_zh: 账号不可用时返回的说明信息。

users.unavailableReason.desc_en: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.
users.unavailableReason.title_zh: 描述账号不可用原因的代码或文字。

status.desc_en: Outcome marker of the request: success when followers were returned, error otherwise.
status.title_zh: 请求结果标记：成功返回关注者为 success，否则为 error。

msg.desc_en: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.
msg.title_zh: 可读的提示信息；当 status 为 error 时承载错误详情。
